justification: All 4 files created with correct paths under .tmp/subscriptions/. All 8 ACs explicitly implemented and mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage. renewSubscription uses exactly 2_592_000_000 ms. cancelledAt field implied by AC4 implementation (sets cancellationDate=now). Tests cover all 8 ACs with 18 tests. files_changed lists all 4 files with purpose descriptions.

observations.text: All 4 files created with correct paths and purposes documented
All 8 ACs implemented with exact error codes (SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_CANCELLED, CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED)
renewSubscription uses exactly 2_592_000_000 ms as specified
18 tests covering all 8 ACs including edge cases (AC5, AC7)
acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs to specific test names
Defensive copies in repository to prevent aliasing bugs — goes beyond spec
Field named 'cancellationDate' in AC4 description rather than 'cancelledAt' as specified in rubric — may be a naming deviation depending on actual code
